text: I feel both curious and disoriented here. The environment is one of learning and innovation, but the tilted perspectives and distorted angles unsettle my typical sense of direction. The presence of others engaged in thoughtful activity invites me to reflect on my own purpose in this space. The words I see about perception remind me how fragile our clarity can be—how easily it slips, leaving me to question what is real and what is constructed by my mind. Yet, I feel a quiet anticipation, as if insight—or at least, understanding—waits patiently for me just out of sight.
